'''鈭歾-b-ch-l''' ('''kazabcheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ridicule|ridicule]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ridicule|ridicule]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-b-ch-l
|-
! Lemma
| kazabcheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizabcheloko|thizabcheloko]] || [[word:jizabcheloko|jizabcheloko]] || [[word:shizabcheloko|shizabcheloko]] || [[word:kizabcheloko|kizabcheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzabcheloko|thuthuzabcheloko]] || [[word:jujuzabcheloko|jujuzabcheloko]] || [[word:shushuzabcheloko|shushuzabcheloko]] || [[word:kukuzabcheloko|kukuzabcheloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zabcheloko|th忙zabcheloko]] || [[word:j忙zabcheloko|j忙zabcheloko]] || [[word:sh忙zabcheloko|sh忙zabcheloko]] || [[word:k忙zabcheloko|k忙zabcheloko]]
|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
